name: askads
description: Yandex Direct, VK Ads, Yandex Metrica and Wordstat in Claude — a zero-setup read-only connector plus local MCP servers for power users. By Ask Ads (askads.ru).

plugins.name: yandex-direct
plugins.description: Read-only Yandex Direct via the Ask Ads remote MCP: campaigns, performance stats, balance & overdraft, Metrica conversions. Zero setup — sign in with Yandex (OAuth), nothing to install. Includes a skill and /yandex-direct:audit command.

plugins.name: yandex-direct-api
plugins.description: Full Yandex Direct API v5 with YOUR OAuth token via the mcp-yandex-direct npm server: statistics, keywords, bids, budgets — including write tools behind explicit confirmation. Requires Node.js 20+ and a Yandex Direct API token (prompted on enable).

plugins.name: vk-ads
plugins.description: VK Ads (VK Реклама) via the mcp-vk-ads npm server with your API token: ad plans, banners, statistics, budgets. Requires Node.js 20+ and a VK Ads access token (prompted on enable).

plugins.name: yandex-metrica
plugins.description: Yandex Metrica web analytics via the mcp-yandex-metrica npm server with your OAuth token: counters, goals, traffic and conversion reports. Requires Node.js 20+ and a Metrica OAuth token (prompted on enable).

plugins.name: yandex-wordstat
plugins.description: Yandex Wordstat search demand via the mcp-yandex-wordstat npm server: keyword frequency, related queries, seasonality and regional demand. Requires Node.js 20+ and a Yandex Cloud API key (prompted on enable).
